title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IKEA India Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!
